mapper.select: SELECT pause_rule_id AS pauseRuleId, rule_name AS ruleName, tiers_json AS tiersJson, status, created_date AS createdDate FROM vip_pause_rule WHERE pause_rule_id = #{pauseRuleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vip_pause_rule (rule_name, tiers_json, status, created_date) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{tiersJson}, #{status}, #{createdDate})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM vip_pause_rule WHERE pause_rule_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit_card WHERE pause_rule_id = #{pauseRuleId}
